_comment: HAND-AUTHORED answer key for the nist_ftc_09 drawing-read eval. Derived ONLY from the callouts DRAWN on the NIST PMI FTC-09 'View A' drawing (a perforated thin plate), tile-cropped from a 500-DPI render into 4 overlapping quadrants and transcribed by eye. NOT from ground_truth/, the .stp, meta.json or topology.json. Values AS DRAWN in DECIMAL INCHES (units=in; NOTES say 'UNITS: INCHES' with bracketed [mm] equivalents - the primary inch values are recorded, NOT the mm brackets), pre-normalization (downstream normalize_to_mm scales x25.4). Each diameter recorded ONCE on its feature. This part has TWO distinct 3X Ø.250 hole patterns (different position-frame datums) and TWO Ø.234 callouts; recorded as separate features. Auditable: re-render page 0 @500 DPI, tile-crop, callouts reappear at the cited provenance.

dimensions.provenance: NOTES block, 'MATERIAL (.1195 THICK) 11 GA 304 SST SHT' - the sheet thickness

features.provenance: TR quadrant, '3X Ø.250 +.003/-.000' upper pattern, frames pos Ø.050(M).260 | A B C and pos Ø.010(P).260 | A
BR quadrant, '3X Ø.250 +.003/-.000' lower pattern, frames pos Ø.050(M).260 | A B C and pos Ø.010(P).260 | A
TR quadrant, top, '2X Ø.234 +/-.008', frame pos Ø.016(M) | A B C
TR/BR quadrants, left and bottom, 'Ø.234 +/-.008' single callouts, frame pos Ø.016 | A | B (datum C)
center of plate, large rectangular cutout (no nominal callout legible on this view)

gdt_frames.provenance: TR quadrant, upper 3X Ø.250, frame pos Ø.050(M) .260 | A | B | C
TR quadrant, upper 3X Ø.250, frame pos Ø.010(P) .260 | A P = projected tolerance zone (NOT a material condition)
BR quadrant, lower 3X Ø.250, frame pos Ø.050(M) .260 | A | B | C
BR quadrant, lower 3X Ø.250, frame pos Ø.010(P) .260 | A
TR quadrant, 2X Ø.234, frame pos Ø.016(M) | A | B | C
TR/BR quadrants, Ø.234 single, frame pos Ø.016 | A | B (datum C)
BR quadrant, bottom-right, profile .05 | A | B | C

title_block.general_tolerance_note: UNITS: INCHES; bracketed [XXX] values are millimetres; plate .1195 thick
